SEARCH
Package DAL

Class PokemonDAL

java.lang.Object
DAL.PokemonDAL
public class PokemonDAL extends Object
Data Access Layer (DAL) class for performing CRUD operations on the Pokémon table.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    PokemonDAL(Connection connection)
    Constructor for PokemonDAL.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    deletePokemon(int pokemonId)
    Deletes a Pokémon from the database if the Pokémon exists.
    List<Pokemon>
    getAllPokemon()
    Retrieves all Pokémon from the Pokémon table.
    int
    getPokedexNumberById(int pokemonId)
    Retrieves Pokédex number of a Pokémon based on its ID.
    String
    getPokemonDetails(int pokemonId)
    Retrieves details of a Pokémon, including trainer name, trainer class, and species name.
    boolean
    insertPokemon(Pokemon pokemon)
    Inserts a new Pokémon into the Pokémon table.
    boolean
    pokemonExists(int pokemonId)
    Checks if a Pokémon exists in the database based on the pokemonId.
    boolean
    updatePokemonLevel(int pokemonId, int newLevel)
    Updates the level of a Pokémon in the database using a stored procedure.

  • Constructor Details

    • PokemonDAL

      public PokemonDAL(Connection connection)
      Constructor for PokemonDAL.
      Parameters:
      connection - the database connection

  • Method Details

    • pokemonExists

      public boolean pokemonExists(int pokemonId)
      Checks if a Pokémon exists in the database based on the pokemonId.
      Parameters:
      pokemonId - the Pokémon ID to check
      Returns:
      true if the Pokémon exists, false otherwise

    • insertPokemon

      public boolean insertPokemon(Pokemon pokemon) throws SQLException
      Inserts a new Pokémon into the Pokémon table.
      Parameters:
      pokemon - the Pokémon object containing Pokémon details
      Returns:
      true if the Pokémon was inserted, false otherwise
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs, including unique constraint violations

    • getAllPokemon

      public List<Pokemon> getAllPokemon()
      Retrieves all Pokémon from the Pokémon table. Utilizes the stored procedure to join information from other tables.
      Returns:
      a list of Region objects

    • deletePokemon

      public boolean deletePokemon(int pokemonId) throws SQLException
      Deletes a Pokémon from the database if the Pokémon exists.
      Parameters:
      pokemonId - the ID of the Pokémon to delete
      Returns:
      true if the Pokémon was successfully deleted, false otherwise
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs, including inadequate permissions

    • getPokemonDetails

      public String getPokemonDetails(int pokemonId)
      Retrieves details of a Pokémon, including trainer name, trainer class, and species name.
      Parameters:
      pokemonId - the ID of the Pokémon
      Returns:
      a string containing the Pokémon's species name, trainer name, and trainer class, or null if not found

    • updatePokemonLevel

      public boolean updatePokemonLevel(int pokemonId, int newLevel)
      Updates the level of a Pokémon in the database using a stored procedure.
      Parameters:
      pokemonId - the ID of the Pokémon to update
      newLevel - the new level to assign to the Pokémon
      Returns:
      true if the level was successfully updated, false otherwise
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if a database error occurs

    • getPokedexNumberById

      public int getPokedexNumberById(int pokemonId) throws SQLException
      Retrieves Pokédex number of a Pokémon based on its ID.
      Parameters:
      pokemonId - the ID of the Pokémon
      Returns:
      the Pokédex number if found, otherwise 0.
      Throws:
      SQLException
